prompt: I have an existing SVG badge at evals/files/conference-badge.svg. Update the subtitle text from 'Design Systems Summit' to 'Design Systems Week', recolor the round icon to #f97316, and export both a revised SVG and a PNG preview. Keep the original source file unchanged and save a resumable project JSON too.
assertions: The revised SVG contains the updated subtitle text 'Design Systems Week'.
The revised SVG uses fill '#f97316' for the imported badge icon.
The run saved a resumable project.inkscape-cli.json file.
